characters.name: Caspar (Fandomania)
characters.description: CasparAffiliationThe ExtolPhysical descriptionSpeciesHuman (Enhanced)GenderMaleAppearancesAppears inFandomania,Fandomania: The Reign of Necron Casparis a supporting character inFandomaniaas well as one of the main protagonists ofFandomania: The Reign of Necron. He's a blond-haired boy who can tend to be rather reckless.

characters.name: Jason (Fandomania)
characters.description: Jason WhiteAffiliationThe ExtolPhysical descriptionSpeciesHuman (Enhanced)GenderMaleAppearancesAppears inFandomania,Fandomania: The Reign of NecronDebutFandomania Jasonis a supporting character inFandomaniaandFandomania: The Reign of Necron. He isMiles' best friend. He has the power to control fire, which he struggles to use, and is timid yet loyal.

characters.name: Miles (Fandomania)
characters.description: Miles MarshalRelativesMartinAffiliationExtolBiographical informationPlace of birthRichmond, VirginiaPhysical descriptionSpeciesHuman (Enhanced)GenderMaleAppearancesAppears inFandomania,Fandomania: The Reign of NecronDebutFandomania Miles Marshalis the main protagonist in theFandomaniaseries. He discovered his superhuman abilities after waking up from a coma, and was then taken to theacademyto learn how to control them and use them to take downNecron.
